name: pdfparser-competitive-corpus-v3
description: Basic + stress + hard synthetic regression corpus, plus optional real PDFs. ICDAR is NOT included (competitive-only, external).

documents.description: Single-page single-column digital text
documents.reference_text:
Simple Digital PDF
This is a born-digital single-column PDF used for baseline text extraction.
It contains the unique token SIMPLE_TOKEN_ALPHA and another SIMPLE_TOKEN_BETA.
Numbers: 12345, currency $99.50, and a date 2026-07-10 should survive extraction.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.

documents.description: Two-column text; reading order should prefer left then right
documents.reference_text:
Two-Column Reading Order Stress
LEFT_COL_START
Left column paragraph one about finance.
Left continues with LEFT_TOKEN_ONE.
More left text to fill the column height.
LEFT_COL_END
RIGHT_COL_START
Right column paragraph one about markets.
Right continues with RIGHT_TOKEN_TWO.
More right text to fill the column height.
RIGHT_COL_END

documents.description: 80-page digital text for throughput and memory
Four embedded raster images with captions
URI link, AcroForm text+checkbox, outline bookmarks
Fully ruled 5x4 table with header row
Whitespace-aligned columns without vector borders
Outer border + header rule only (hybrid lattice/stream)
7x5 financial lattice with commas, percents, notes
Text + image + small lattice table on one page
Second page has /Rotate 90
AES encrypted PDF; password 'benchpass'
Multi-page bank ledger with long wrapped descriptions, ACH/wire/POS, repeating header
documents.accuracy_notes: Logical single ledger; page split into 2 tables scores detection within tolerance

documents.description: Narrow columns + multi-line overflowing cells; row-split failure mode
documents.quality_notes: Success only if mega text stays in ONE cell / same row structure

documents.description: Two-row headers with horizontal and vertical spans

cells: Operating Expenses — Sales & Marketing plus G&A combined line that wraps

documents.description: Two adjacent tables with different row counts
Invoice with long line-item descriptions + totals spans
documents.accuracy_notes: Gold grid is line-item body (5x6); totals span rows may expand predicted shape

documents.description: Landscape 12x30 dense numeric grid
Diagonal watermark overlapping table-like text
documents.quality_notes: Watermark text may interleave; libraries differ on order

documents.description: Table with superscript markers + footnote block below
CA WARN multi-page layoff notices — classic pdfplumber demo (wide tables, many rows)
documents.license_note: Example from pdfplumber project (public demo data)

documents.description: NICS background checks table — multi-line headers, dense columns
US Census Statistical Abstract table — classic Tabula lattice sample
documents.license_note: US government work / Tabula test fixture

documents.description: Argentina diputados voting record — irregular grid, multi-section
Campaign contribution report multi-page — stream-like rows
Camelot foo.pdf — multi-table fuel savings research pages
Camelot twotables — disease outbreak table(s)
documents.accuracy_notes: Ideal ~2 tables; over-segmentation heavily penalized via detection precision

documents.description: State-wise liabilities table with superscripts (Contd.)
IRS Form 1040 — form fields, lines, labels, not a clean data table
documents.accuracy_notes: Tax form: expected_table_count=0 to penalize false-positive tables

documents.description: Fed Beige Book (~50+ pages) — long narrative + district sections
TensorFlow whitepaper (arXiv) — multi-column scientific layout, figures, refs
documents.license_note: arXiv paper — check paper license for redistribution
documents.accuracy_notes: Text-primary scientific paper; tables not gold-labeled

documents.description: NIST technical series PDF (may be withdrawal wrapper + body) — long formal doc
Italian insurance product PDF with embedded tables/regions
documents.license_note: Third-party sample used in open-source tests; verify before shipping

documents.description: Three vertically stacked lattice tables with different shapes on one page
documents.quality_notes: Success: detect 3 tables with exact shapes 5x5, 4x3, 6x3. Fail: one fused mega-grid.

documents.description: Two pages, two lattice tables each (4 tables total), heterogeneous shapes
documents.quality_notes: Detect 4 tables; do not merge across vertical gaps or pages.

documents.description: Full-page decorative frame + margin rules surrounding one real lattice table
documents.quality_notes: expected_table_count=1. Page border must not create a second table or inflate rows/cols.

documents.description: Financial table with colspan group headers (FY2024/FY2025 span 2 cols)

expected_tables.span_notes: cols 1-2 header span FY2024; cols 3-4 header span FY2025

documents.quality_notes: Primary gold is 7×6 visual grid. Span-aware extractors may emit colspan metadata; cell tokens TOKEN_H53_* must land in correct columns.

documents.description: Inventory table with rowspan category labels in column 0
documents.quality_notes: 8×4 visual grid with empty category placeholders under spans.

documents.description: Lattice table whose H/V strokes do not meet at corners (3pt gaps)
documents.quality_notes: Vector joiners without gap-close may miss the table or invent wrong cell count.

documents.description: Two lattice tables stacked with only 14pt gap; 4×6 then 5×2
documents.quality_notes: Fail mode: one table ~9×6 or wrong col count from merged y-lines.

documents.description: 16-row × 13-col ruled statistical table (states × years)
documents.quality_notes: Exact shape 16×13 required for shape_exact credit.

documents.description: One ledger table continued across 3 pages (repeating header)
documents.quality_notes: Primary gold: 3 page fragments of 13×4 (header+12). Stitch-aware systems may emit 1 logical 37×4 — see alternate_logical_table.

alternate_logical_table.note: If stitch merges pages and drops repeated headers: 1+36 rows also acceptable

documents.description: Two borderless stream tables separated by prose on one page
documents.quality_notes: Detect 2 stream tables; prose must not form a third table.

documents.description: One lattice and one stream table on the same page
documents.quality_notes: Strong lattice must not suppress stream region below.

documents.description: Real 6×3 lattice amid many decorative horizontal rules and margin ticks
documents.quality_notes: expected 1 table 6×3; deco lines must not inflate row count.

documents.description: Two side-by-side lattices with narrow gutter + third table below (3 total)
documents.quality_notes: Detect 3 tables: 5×2, 4×3, 5×4. Fail: fuse left+right or all three.

documents.description: Many decorative full-width H-rules + one lattice table
documents.quality_notes: Success: n_tables=1 shape 5×3. Fail: extra tables from section rules.

documents.description: Full page border + header rule + one table
Two lattices + left-margin tick marks (must not form tables)
4×2 lattice plus stray underlines below; must stay 4×2 one table
9×6 ruled grid with many empty cells (must keep, not FP-scrub)
Numbered prose list — expect ZERO tables
documents.quality_notes: Success: 0 tables. Any stream table is a false positive.

documents.description: Tiny caption-like grid + one real data table; prefer 1 table (data)
documents.quality_notes: Ideal n=1 (data). Emitting caption 2×2 as second table fails detect F1.

documents.description: Three disjoint stacked lattices (4×2, 3×3, 5×2)
3-page ledger + footer rules; 3 tables 9×3 (header+8)
Colspan group header FY24 over Act/Bud
Empty form field boxes + one data table; expect 1 table only
True 5×3 table + short non-spanning V ticks; must stay 3 cols
Two stream tables with large prose gap (6×3 and 6×2)
